understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' in the current BP35 level (and then continue clearing subsequent levels) within the allowed attempts/turns, while avoiding dying.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a movement action (e.g., MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) to change the player position by one tile in that direction if the tile is traversable. Gravity is active (shown as DOWN here), meaning after movement the player is pulled in the gravity direction until supported/blocked by a solid tile. Landing on a spike/hazard tile ends the attempt immediately and restarts the level (with only 2 attempts total). Each attempt has a fixed turn budget (50). Undo (when available) would revert the last move/state, including position and gravity-related outcomes.

moving_platform.warning: URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 6 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.
